description: Hosted search engines and product/web analytics platforms.

entries.name: Algolia
entries.summary: Fast, hosted search-as-a-service API with typo tolerance, faceting, and instant-search UI components.
entries.paidFrom: Grow plan billed on usage above free tier.

entries.name: Meilisearch
entries.summary: Open-source, fast search engine with a managed cloud option; self-hosted is fully free.
entries.freeTier: Free self-hosted; Cloud free trial credits for new accounts.

entries.name: Typesense
entries.summary: Open-source, typo-tolerant search engine optimized for speed, with a managed Typesense Cloud option.
entries.freeTier: Free self-hosted; Cloud has a free tier for small clusters.
entries.paidFrom: Cloud plans billed hourly per cluster size.

entries.name: Elastic Cloud
entries.summary: Managed Elasticsearch, Kibana, and the full Elastic Stack for search, logging, and observability.
entries.freeTier: 14-day free trial; self-managed Elasticsearch core remains free/open under Elastic license.
entries.paidFrom: Standard plan billed hourly on cloud usage.

entries.name: Plausible Analytics
entries.summary: Lightweight, privacy-focused, cookie-free web analytics, open source with a hosted option.
entries.freeTier: 30-day free trial; self-hosted community edition is free.
entries.paidFrom: Hosted plans from $9/month for up to 10k pageviews.

entries.name: Umami
entries.summary: Simple, open-source, privacy-friendly web analytics as a self-hosted alternative to Google Analytics.
entries.freeTier: Free self-hosted; Umami Cloud has a free tier for up to 100k events/month.

entries.name: PostHog
entries.summary: Open-source product analytics suite: event tracking, session replay, feature flags, and A/B testing in one platform.
entries.paidFrom: Pay-as-you-go billing beyond free monthly quotas.

entries.name: Mixpanel
entries.summary: Product analytics platform focused on event-based funnels, retention, and cohort analysis.
entries.freeTier: 20M events/month free on the free tier.
entries.paidFrom: Growth plan billed on monthly tracked users.

entries.name: Google Analytics
entries.summary: Google's widely used web/app analytics platform (GA4), tracking traffic, behavior, and conversions.
entries.freeTier: Free with generous usage limits for the vast majority of sites.
